first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the mean score delta across all runs is zero. The reasoning, strengths, and concerns in both evaluations are substantively the same, focusing on a lack of explicit GenAI experience (RAG, vector DBs) and deep cloud expertise. The minor differences in wording and specificity (e.g., mentioning AWS CDK, LangGraph) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills.
